comment: Editing Language (hyper-gaming / TikTok style). ROLE -> list of recipe VARIANTS (cycled, seeded per video) so repeated beats differ on purpose. A STYLE PACK is a different copy of this file. Effects fire at 'offset' seconds from the clip's IMPACT ANCHOR ('{label}' -> clip label). Audio: 'sfx' effects mix a meme sound (from Memes/SFX, chosen from a named category) OVER the original game audio - they never replace it. A 'meme' effect INSERTS a meme-video INTERRUPT right AFTER the clip: the game FREEZES on its last frame while the meme plays with its own audio, then the reel resumes. Meme treatments (Memes/IMGS, keyed by 'asset' -> meme_library): 'subject' AI-removes the background (any clip with a separable subject), 'overlay' chroma-keys (green/white screens), 'cutaway' full-frame. 'callout' = bold animated caption: 'animation' pop|punch|slide|rise|fade, 'color' any ffmpeg colour, optional 'size' + 'y' (0-1 height fraction). zoom intensity = extra scale (0.15=115%); shake = px amplitude (needs a zoom); flash = added brightness 0-1; sfx volume defaults 0.8.
meme_comment: mode 'subject' = AI background removal (rembg) -> the moving subject is isolated and composited over the frozen game (works on ANY clip with a separable subject, no green screen needed); 'overlay' = fast chroma-key for real green/white screens; 'cutaway' = full-frame takeover for stylised clips with no isolatable subject. 'fps' (subject only) is the matte frame rate (memes tolerate ~15).

hook_cinematic.comment: Grand opener: big slow zoom, held title, hype shout.

impact_punch.comment: Aggressive: fast hard zoom + shake + flash + bass thud + tag.

impact_dramatic.comment: Dramatic silence: slow creeping zoom + eerie tension riser, then FREEZE for a disappointed-reaction meme (subject keyed over the frozen game).

impact_flashy.comment: Flashy: double flash + shake + pop + tag.

hero_finish.comment: The payoff: biggest zoom, flash, held FINAL tag, big reaction, then a full-screen celebration cutaway meme.

splash.comment: Phase change: soft push + big word + a cheeky comedy sting.

finale.comment: Victory: hold the word over the confetti + a triumphant shout.
